title: odontostephana carolinensis
intro: Odontostephana carolinensis, also known as Carolina horse gentian or horse gentian, is a plant species in the Gentianaceae family, native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Odontostephana carolinensis include its potential use in treating sore throats, coughs, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
